channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Critical Kirki flaw exploited to hijack WordPress admin accounts
item.description: Hackers are exploiting a critical privilege escalation vulnerability (CVE-2026-8206) in the Kirki plugin for WordPress to take over any user account, including those belonging to administrators. [...]...

item.description: XRP had a rather difficult start to 2026 from a price standpoint, but the underlying XRP Ledger showed notable signs of growth, according to the latest State of XRP report by Messari. The analytics fi...

item.title: Bombay High Court Issues Injunction Prohibiting Hackers From Publishing Allegedly Hacked HDFC Investor Data (1)
item.description: The Bombay High Court granted interim relief to HDFC AMC after a ransomware group called “Morpheus” allegedly stole over 680 GB of sensitive company and investor data. The court barred unidentified ha...
item.dc:creator: DataBreaches.net

item.title: Dutch Authorities Dismantle Botnet Linked to 17 Million Infected Devices
item.description:
Dutch authorities have announced the takedown of a botnet that enslaved millions of infected devices, including computers, tablets, smartphones, and IoT devices, to carry out malicious attacks.
The b...

item.title: SEC charges Texas man with $12.3M crypto fraud using fake AI trading bots

item.title: Microsoft’s incident response is getting a failing grade from researchers (1)
item.description: Microsoft is ticking off a lot of researchers this week by claiming that those who dump proof-of-concept exploits for vulnerabilities they have not responsibly disclosed are enabling criminal activity...

item.title: PAN-OS GlobalProtect Authentication Bypass (CVE-2026-0257) Under Active Exploitation
item.description:
Palo Alto Networks has warned that a recently disclosed medium-severity security flaw impacting PAN-OS and Prisma Access has come under active exploitation in the wild.
The vulnerability, tracked as ...
